name: Varrio St. Andrews (STA)
description: Varrio St. Andrews : is a relative new varrio, predominately Latino, located in the area of North St. Andrews Place between Melrose and Beverly. This neighborhood is NOT linked to the now defunct neighborhood Barrio St. Andrews (BSA) that was located in the Mid Town section of Los Angeles.

sources.title: Varrio St. Andrews (STA) in Hollywood area — StreetGangs
